description: CompositionFuschia pink T-shirt made of 58% cotton and 42% polyester Dri-Fit fabric, has a round ribbed neckline, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry on lowWarm iron onlyDo not dry cleanDo not iron on print or embroideryThis fuschia pink T-shirt from nike is a perfect mix of sporty style and bold feminine colours. The graphic print with the words "Run" and "walk" written on it inspire you to do just that, while the Dri-Fit fabric wicks sweat away from the body and keeps you feeling cool and comfortable all day long. Team this with jeans or tracks.
